zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Comyn於1223年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵時，她的父親William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan60歲，母親Countess Margaret Buchan39歲。她於大約1242年與Sir William De Mar V Earl在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1267年在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米享年44歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Comyn于1223年出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵时，她的父亲William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan60岁，母亲Countess Margaret Buchan39岁。她于大约1242年与Sir William De Mar V Earl在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1267年在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米享年44岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Comyn was born in 1223, in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan, was 60 and her mother, Countess Margaret Buchan, was 39. She married Sir William De Mar V Earl about 1242, in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1267, in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Comyn est née en 1223, à Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Countess Margaret Buchan, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William De Mar V Earl environ 1242, à Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1267, à Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Comyn 1223 in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan 60 und ihre Mutter Countess Margaret Buchan 39. Sie hat um 1242 in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland Sir William De Mar V Earl geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1267 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Comyn è nata il nel 1223 nel Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan, aveva 60 anni e sua madre, Countess Margaret Buchan, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Sir William De Mar V Earl circa 1242, nel Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1267, nel Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Comynが1223年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアブチャンで生まれた時，父William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchanは60歳，母Countess Margaret Buchanは39歳であった。約1242年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアキルドルンミーでSir William De Mar V Earlと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1267年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアキルドルンミーで44歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Comyn(이)가 1223년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 버챈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan(은)는 60세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Countess Margaret Buchan(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 대략 1242년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 킬드럼미에서 Sir William De Mar V Earl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1267년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 킬드럼미에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Aberdeenshire, Scotland: Coontie o Aiberdeen, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Kildrummy Castle, Aberdeenshire, Scotlan: Kildrummy, Coontie o Aiberdeen, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Comyn nasceu em 1223, em Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Countess Margaret Buchan, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William De Mar V Earl aproximadamente 1242, em Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1267, em Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Comyn родилась в 1223 г. в местности бучань, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Margaret Buchan, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William De Mar V Earl около 1242 г. в местности каилдрумми, абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1267 г. в местности каилдрумми, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Comyn nació en 1223, en Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William Comyn Lord of Badenoch and Earl Of Buchan, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Countess Margaret Buchan, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Sir William De Mar V Earl aproximadamente 1242, en Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1267, en Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
